title: "Dual" Citori CXS - Vic's point blank
description: Content pack for Vic's Point Blank that adds two baller shotguns as one shotgun.
body:
You take an over and under shotgun, and you get another, then you glue them together. Yeah you've created a monster.

Content pack for Vic's Point Blank

Model, texture, and sounds are by Vic4games from the base mod (Vic's Point Blank)
Absolutely CLEAN animations by me because I had nothing to do 

You're welcome 


Installation guide : 
1. Go to your minecraft version's file 
2. Create a new folder and name it "pointblank"
3. Add the pack into the previously mentioned folder
4. Have fun idk
